data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: The test_llm_review_pr_only_condition test in tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-job.sh only checks that 'pull_request' appears in the if: condition, not that 'base_ref == main' is also present. The new guard requires both conditions. A targeted test verifying the full guard expression (pull_request AND base_ref == main) would prevent regression.
File: .github/workflows/ci.yml
Category: verification
data.title: [CI guard test]: Missing base_ref=main assertion in test_llm_review_pr_only_condition
